{{Quote|Everyone said he moved unlike any player they'd ever seen, and now we know why.|[[Kova Naan]] upon learning Noviee was a Clawdite changeling|<ref name="HNN 56" />}}
'''Rolsat "Rolstone" Noviee''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Clawdite/Legends|Clawdite]]. For nine standard years, he posed as a [[Lannik (species)/Legends|Lannik]] for the [[New Osler Flejj Beasts]], a [[Pugil]] team. Exposed by a random [[Blood/Legends|blood]] test in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], he immediately fled the planet [[Lannik/Legends|Lannik]]. Until his blood test, he was the highest-scoring and highest-paid player in Lannik history. Teammate [[Kova Naan]], interviewed in the aftermath, quipped to a reporter that even he might be Noviee.<ref name="HNN 56" />
